positive: A majestic, stylized celestial forest scene. Focus on large, geometric bioluminescent flora and intertwining cosmic vines creating a repeating, symmetrical pattern. The composition is centralized and highly detailed, featuring strong, deep indigo blues contrasting sharply with glowing emerald greens and brilliant gold accents. Utilize a linework, mandala-inspired vector art style with clean, crisp silhouettes. The lighting should be dramatic and internalized, giving the appearance of glowing edges (emissive effect). Perfect for a repeating apparel print, maximizing negative space for excellent contrast. Minimalist yet intricate.
negative: photo, photorealistic, low resolution, blurry, dirty, smudged, text, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, artifacts, noise, poor detail, childish, cartoon
